title: Single cell RNA sequencing of retrogradely labeled mouse stellate ganglion neuron
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"5cmv","text":"A collection of protocols to sequence and analyze single neurons from the stellate ganglia of mice after injection of Cholera Toxin B (CTB) in the interscapular brown adipose fat.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bupc1","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5n75v","text":"Step 1: Retrograde labeling of brown adipose tissue (BAT)-projecting sympathetic neurons with cholera toxin B (CTB)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":7}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"f40ls","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4qcrj","text":"Step 2: Ganglia dissociation and single-cell sorting","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":7}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fpsrp","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"er6ld","text":"Step 3: Single-cell sequencing and analysis","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":7}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
